nasb.text: The sons of Israel went up against the sons of Benjamin on the third day and arrayed themselves against Gibeah as at other times.

esv.text: And the people of Israel went up against the people of Benjamin on the third day and set themselves in array against Gibeah, as at other times.

cnv.text: 第三天，以色列人又上去攻打便雅憫人，在基比亞前面列陣，像前兩次一樣。

ccb.text: 第三天，以色列人又像前两次一样在基比亚列阵，攻打便雅悯人。
